description_long: This is a classic, upright fire hydrant painted in a weathered yellow color, featuring a domed top with a central black operating nut. The hydrant has two large side outlets capped with round metal covers, each secured by a short metal chain, and a smaller front outlet also capped and chained. The body is cylindrical with flanged bases at the top and bottom, fastened by visible bolts, and the surface shows signs of wear, rust, and grime, indicating long-term outdoor exposure. The side outlets are symmetrically positioned, and the chains prevent the caps from being lost when removed. Subtle manufacturer or model markings are embossed on the main body, visible in some views. The hydrant stands on a thick, dark base, likely designed for stability and anchoring to the ground.
description: A weathered yellow fire hydrant with chained metal caps, a domed top, and embossed markings, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a chained cap, both side outlets, and the domed top with the operating nut.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one large outlet with its chain and cap, and the cylindrical body with visible bolts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both side outlets, the back of the cylindrical body, and clear manufacturer/model markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other large outlet and its chain, with the front outlet partially visible.
